body.title: End-to-end integration: DatacenterClient + Skeleton round-trip via IMAP stub
body.result: Slice 3 green-test ships: 3 end-to-end cases (Igor round-trip, unknown agent rejected, CC profile round-trip) verify DatacenterClient↔Skeleton over IMAP stub. Background pumper drives skeleton.announce_pump() during client poll. 165 passed. agent_datacenter commit 44d97b0.
body.description:
Slice 3 green-test: a real Skeleton boots with the canonical Igor profile and an IMAPServer (stub mode); a DatacenterClient instance with an Igor IdentityEnvelope is wired to the same IMAPServer; client.announce() posts to comms://announce, the test drives skeleton.announce_pump() once, and the client polls comms://announce-events to pick up the Manifest. Asserts cache is populated, accessor methods return expected bindings/state_refs/channels for Igor's profile (inference + postgres + swadl tools, twm/ne/milieu state_refs, shared+igor-cc channels, console+inference surfaces).

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/tests/test_announce_client_integration.py (NEW)
**Design rules:** uses real Skeleton + real IMAPServer (stub mode) — no mocks; bounded timeout on poll so a hung pipe fails fast; test failure = slice 3 doesn't ship.
**Scope boundary:** in — single end-to-end round-trip test using DatacenterClient against booted Skeleton. Out — multi-agent concurrent test, persistence across client recreations, cross-process test (separate Skeleton process).
**Test plan:** test_client_round_trip_via_skeleton (Igor announces, manifest cached, accessors return expected items); test_client_announce_unknown_agent_raises_via_error_envelope (post envelope for an agent without a profile, broker publishes kind=error, client surfaces it as exception).
